name: Nextpower Inc. Class A Common Stock
description: Nextpower (and its subsidiaries) is a leading provider of intelligent, integrated solar tracker and software solutions used in utility-scale and distributed generation solar projects around the world. Nextpower's products enable solar panels in utility-scale power plants to follow the sun's movement across the sky and optimize plant performance. Nextpower has operations in the United States, Mexico, Spain and other countries in Europe, India, Australia, the Middle East, Africa, and Brazil.
sic_description: SEARCH, DETECTION, NAVIGATION, GUIDANCE, AERONAUTICAL SYS
